name: Kent Adrian Sato
title: Full Stack Engineer
description: I'm a Full Stack Engineer who turns complex ideas into scalable platforms. I enjoy modernizing systems, leading teams, and building cloud-native solutions.

about.journey: Passionate about building robust, scalable systems that drive business growth. With 8 years of hands-on experience in full-stack development and systems architecture, I specialize in transforming complex technical challenges into elegant solutions. Proven track record of modernizing legacy systems, including architecting high-concurrency AWS serverless environments and containerized microservices from the ground up. Combines deep technical expertise in modern JavaScript ecosystems (Node.js/Angular) with a strong command of engineering operations, mentoring cross-functional teams to accelerate delivery and optimize system performance.
whatIDo: Leading cloud migrations & modernizing legacy systems
Managing global development teams & mentoring engineers

experience.description: Architected and executed a complete system migration from legacy PHP/MuleSoft to AWS Lambda and containerized applications environment using Node.js, engineering a scalable and stable architecture that securely supports 1,000+ users and achieving zero downtime with absolute data integrity throughout the transition.
points: Led and mentored a team of three developers through structured code reviews and technical guidance, establishing development best practices.
Designed and deployed comprehensive onboarding SOPs, robust technical documentation, and shared code libraries, slashing new developer onboarding ramp-up time by 60%.
Leveraged AI-assisted development tools and LLMs to accelerate code generation and automate unit test creation, significantly increasing sprint velocity.
Collaborated with international cross-functional teams and the VP of Technology within a 2-week Agile sprint cycle.

experience.company: Above Digital (Little Ripple Company, Pty. Ltd.)
experience.description: Led a team of six developers through structured code reviews and technical mentorship, embedding engineering best practices and building a culture of continuous improvement.
points: Engineered a scalable system architecture supporting 100+ concurrent users with 99.9% uptime, automating manual business processes by 75%.
Managed the full Agile SDLC from initial requirements analysis and system design through to implementation, testing, and product deployment.

experience.company: Little Ripple Company, Pty. Ltd. (Our Global Team, Inc.)
experience.description: Established the core architectural foundation and development frameworks for a large-scale end-to-end ERP solution.
points: Programmed and launched complex enterprise modules spanning finance, inventory, and customer management from the ground up.
Earned promotion to Senior Developer ahead of schedule by consistently scaling responsibilities and demonstrating strong ownership of the core system codebase.

experience.description: Managed end-to-end freelance operations including client communication, project scoping, and invoicing while maintaining a 95% client satisfaction rate.
points: Built custom WordPress websites for local small businesses, developing bespoke themes and integrating third-party plugins.
Provided versatile technical and digital support for 5+ clients, handling administrative workflows and creating marketing assets using Adobe Creative Suite.
